description_long: This bungalow features a wide, low-profile structure with a prominent green gabled roof and a large overhang that shades the front facade. The exterior walls are finished in a combination of white and brown, with the brown section resembling wood paneling. The front entrance is accentuated by a covered porch supported by white columns, flanked by two palm trees and paved walkways. The windows are symmetrically arranged along the front, with multiple rectangular panes visible. The side and rear views reveal a consistent roofline and additional brown paneling, with the rear showing fewer architectural details. The overall design is simple yet functional, evoking a modern suburban or tropical bungalow style.
description: A wide, low-profile bungalow with a green gabled roof, brown and white exterior, and a covered front porch supported by columns.
description_view_0: Front view showing the covered porch, symmetrical windows, two palm trees, and main entrance.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the deep roof overhang and the extension of the paved walkway.
description_view_2: Rear view with minimal window detail and a continuous green roof.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the brown paneling, side windows, and palm trees near the porch.
